About Me

I'm a passionate thumbnail designer with 5+ years of experience creating eye-catching YouTube thumbnails. I specialize in understanding what makes viewers click and translating that into compelling visual designs.

My approach combines psychology, design principles, and data-driven insights to create thumbnails that not only look great but actually convert viewers. I've worked with creators across gaming, vlogs, education, and tech.
